rules.rationale: Additional page-window links inside already seeded topics are usually pagination/navigation evidence. They are reviewed as deferred by default and require an exact accept decision before changing seed scope.

decisions.rationale: Repeated purchase-topic link from Xiaomi 13T discussion, battery, and accessories snapshots; useful for device-specific availability, variants, and owner context.
Repeated KernelSU instruction link from Xiaomi 13T firmware/root windows; useful root-method background for answer grounding.
Repeated Xiaomi firmware download link from Xiaomi 13T firmware/root windows; useful firmware-source background for retrieval.
Repeated camera-discussion link from Xiaomi 13T discussion snapshots; useful for device camera issue coverage.
Related Xiaomi 13T Pro / Redmi K60 Ultra topic, but not the Xiaomi 13T target profile. Keep as sibling-device context until the reference profile needs cross-device comparison.
Generic PWM/display topic linked from Xiaomi 13T discussion. Potentially useful for display issue research, but not accepted into the first device-focused seed expansion.
Generic Xiaomi club topic. Keep as broad ecosystem context rather than reference-profile seed scope.
Generic reupload/help topic linked from recovery windows. Useful only if attachment/link recovery becomes a separate workflow.
